name: SOP Pipeline — 2a+2b SharePoint to Azure Blob

nodes.name: Setup Config
nodes.notes: All config here — SharePoint paths, Supabase keys, Azure Blob details. No changes needed anywhere else.

nodes.name: Get Root Site
nodes.notes: Gets the root SharePoint site to extract the tenant domain (e.g. cloudnavision.sharepoint.com).

nodes.name: List SOP Files
nodes.notes: @microsoft.graph.downloadUrl is returned automatically for file items even though it's not in $select.

nodes.name: Get Processed Files
nodes.notes: Returns file_ids already processed — used to skip re-processing.

nodes.name: Process One File At a Time
nodes.notes: Output 0 = all done (loop ends). Output 1 = one file per batch → Download node.

nodes.name: Download from SharePoint
nodes.notes: Downloads video binary via Graph API /content. Binary stored in binary.data. 5-min timeout for large files.

nodes.name: Generate SOP ID
nodes.notes: Generates UUID for new SOP, builds Azure Blob URL, cleans filename for title. Passes binary data through for upload.

nodes.name: Upload to Azure Blob
nodes.notes: Azure Blob PUT returns HTTP 201 with empty body — this is normal/success. alwaysOutputData=true ensures the workflow continues.

parameters.body:
={
  "id": "{{ $('Generate SOP ID').first().json.sop_id }}",
  "title": "{{ $('Generate SOP ID').first().json.title }}",
  "status": "processing",
  "video_url": "{{ $('Generate SOP ID').first().json.blob_url }}",
  "video_file_size_bytes": {{ $('Generate SOP ID').first().json.file_size_bytes }},
  "meeting_date": "{{ $('Generate SOP ID').first().json.meeting_date }}"
}

nodes.name: Create SOP Record
nodes.notes: Creates the SOP record in Supabase with status='processing'. References Generate SOP ID node since Azure Blob PUT returns empty body.

nodes.name: Mark File as Processed
nodes.notes: Inserts into processed_sharepoint_files so the file is skipped on future runs. Without this, the same file re-uploads every 15 minutes.

nodes.name: Create Pipeline Run
nodes.notes: Creates pipeline_runs record. Phase 2c (Gemini) will PATCH this with token counts and cost.

main.node: Process One File At a Time

notes:
=== SETUP ===

1. Credential: 'Saara - Sharepoint' (oAuth2Api) — re-select on all SharePoint HTTP nodes after import.

2. All config is in Setup Config node — already filled in with real values.

=== REQUIRED SUPABASE TABLE ===

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS processed_sharepoint_files (
    id              uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    file_id         text NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    file_name       text NOT NULL,
    file_size_bytes bigint,
    processed_at    timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    sop_id          uuid REFERENCES sops(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  );
  CREATE INDEX idx_processed_sharepoint_files_file_id ON processed_sharepoint_files(file_id);

=== NOTES ===

- Azure Blob PUT (Upload to Azure Blob) returns HTTP 201 with empty body — this is normal success.
- Create SOP Record and Create Pipeline Run reference Generate SOP ID node directly since Azure returns no body.
- Phase 2c connects after Create Pipeline Run to run Gemini transcription.
